items.name_en: , [Extended Shoulder Strap] 🥰 New GG brand series continues the design philosophy that items should not only be popular for a season, but remain timeless as time passes. The classic interlaced letter element derived from the initials of Guccio Gucci continues to inject brand identity charm into new designs. This Ophidia small bag features the historic GG Supreme canvas material, with double G accessories. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, brown leather trim, double G, adjustable top handle, top zip closure. Model: 735145. Dimensions: 21*19*5cm. Color: Brown/pvc. Italian creation

items.name_en: !!️《Full set of original green box packaging》!!️ Creative Director Sabato De Sarno presents a new GG monogram coated fabric, creating a soft, lightweight, and durable exquisite material. This Gucci Horsebit 1955 chain wallet is presented in beige and dark brown, cleverly incorporating elegant black leather piping.
items.name_cn:
!!️《Full set of original green box packaging》!!️ Creative Director Sabato De Sarno presents a new GG monogram coated fabric, creating a soft, lightweight, and durable exquisite material. This Gucci Horsebit 1955 chain wallet is presented in beige and dark brown, cleverly incorporating elegant black leather piping.
Beige and dark brown new GG monogram coated fabric
Black leather piping
Light gold-tone hardware
Cloud fabric lining
Interior: 6 card slots, 1 flat pocket, 1 gusset zipper pocket, and 1 open pocket
1 zipper pocket
1 open pocket
Detachable chain length 58cm
Snap closure
Weight: approx. 0.3kg
Model: 621892.
Open dimensions: 19cm (W) x 21cm (H) x 2.5cm (D)
Closed dimensions: 19cm (W) x 10cm (H) x 4cm (D)
Color: Beige/pvc.
Italian creation

items.name_en: !!️《With full original green box packaging》!!️【New】Gucci Jackie Small Shoulder Bag. This brand-new Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag is crafted from premium leather, showcasing the brand's classic craftsmanship, crescent shape, and stylish design. The light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and matching strap with red and green stripes combine to offer more styling possibilities for this Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag made from the brand's classic black Gucci Rosso Ancora leather. Gucci Rosso Ancora leather, light gold-tone hardware, leather lining, inside: one zip pocket, Gucci logo zip pull, top handle (18cm high), detachable webbing shoulder strap (52cm high), hook closure, weight: approx. 0.4kg.
items.name_cn:
!!️《With full original green box packaging》!!️【New】Gucci Jackie Small Shoulder Bag. This brand-new Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag is crafted from premium leather, showcasing the brand's classic craftsmanship, crescent shape, and stylish design. The light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and matching strap with red and green stripes combine to offer more styling possibilities for this Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag made from the brand's classic black Gucci Rosso Ancora leather. Gucci Rosso Ancora leather, light gold-tone hardware, leather lining, inside: one zip pocket, Gucci logo zip pull, top handle (18cm high), detachable webbing shoulder strap (52cm high), hook closure, weight: approx. 0.4kg.
Model: 782849.
Dimensions: 27.5(W) x 19(H) x 4cm(D)
Color: Black/Original Leather.
Made in Italy
Model height 177cm
Max fits: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, Long wallet, and Lipstick

The light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and matching strap with red and green stripes combine to offer more styling possibilities for this Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag made from the brand's classic white Gucci Rosso Ancora leather. Gucci Rosso Ancora leather, light gold-tone hardware, leather lining, inside: one zip pocket, Gucci logo zip pull, top handle (18cm high), detachable webbing shoulder strap (52cm high), hook closure, weight: approx. 0.4kg.
Model: 782849.
Dimensions: 27.5(W) x 19(H) x 4cm(D)
Color: White/Original Leather.
Made in Italy
Model height 177cm
Max fits: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, Long wallet, and Lipstick
